Welcome {Employee}! Use WASD or <Key id="Gamepad_Left2D"/>  to move around, move the mouse cursor to look around and press [{Key0}] to interact. We will explain things as we go.

Pay attention to the doppler radar! It warns you about imminent tornados and storms. It can (hopefully) help you avoid them. It also tells you where other employees are and whether they are alive, or not...

Represents the player having damage reducction on fire damage
Represents if the player is protected against lightning strikes
Represents the player when they are carrying a heavy/big object. Will only go await after the player drops the heavy item.
Represents if a player is inside the protection area of an Iron Umbrella. It will make the player invulnerable to acid rain and hail storms

Represents the player being anchored, this gives the player resistance to getting dragged by tornadoes

Represents the player when they standed unprotected in the rain for more than 20 seconds. Will go away after 60 seconds of not being in contact the rain. (having contact with the rain will restart the timer)
